flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Manhattanville College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($28.0k → $32.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Manhattanville College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.4k → $44.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Manhattanville College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (53.7% vs 61.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Manhattanville College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
